commit_scope: Classify rollout gateway 404 pages as transient in the external production proof while keeping JSON API 404 responses hard failures.

local_validation.notes: Focused tests prove an upstream text 404 page exits with TRANSIENT_FAILED_EXIT and a JSON API 404 still exits as a real failure.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push, PR, and GitHub checks.

phase_gate.reason: Local proof is complete. CI, merge, and production verification are still pending.

evidence_refs: GitHub Actions run 26739034630 failed the main External proof with an upstream-style '404 page not found' after POST /api/ideas had already succeeded.

Direct public checks against https://api.coherencycoin.com/api/ideas/foo/stage and PATCH /api/ideas/foo returned FastAPI 401 responses at main SHA 15b80f3d, proving the routes were present after deploy.
api/tests/test_external_proof_demo.py covers both rollout text 404 transient handling and JSON API 404 hard failure behavior.
